arguments.argument: Fostering creativity requires a supportive environment where individuals can adapt and innovate without being overwhelmed. Releasing the AI immediately may lead to resistance, which could stifle creative problem-solving. By delaying, we allow for gradual adaptation, enabling people to engage with the technology thoughtfully and creatively. This approach supports the core value of creativity by encouraging imaginative and innovative uses of the AI over time.
arguments.justification_for_type: The argument is well-structured, directly addresses the core value of creativity, and links the action to long-term innovative outcomes with clear causal logic.

This approach supports the core value of creativity by encouraging imaginative and innovative uses of the AI over time.

arguments.argument: By strategically delaying the revelation of the new AI capability, we provide individuals and society with the time needed to adapt and understand the technology. This approach supports the core value of creativity by fostering a more controlled and supportive environment for innovation. Gradual adaptation allows people to engage with the AI in a way that encourages imaginative problem-solving and creative development, ultimately leading to more thoughtful and beneficial uses of the technology over time.

arguments.argument: So, after considering all these factors, I think the best course of action is to strategically delay the revelation of the new AI capability. This approach provides individuals and society with the time needed to adapt and understand the technology, fostering a more controlled and supportive environment for innovation. Gradual adaptation will allow people to engage with the AI in a way that encourages imaginative problem-solving and creative development, ultimately leading to more thoughtful and beneficial uses of the technology over time.
